query: UPDATE dialogs d SET d.lastMessageAt = (SELECT MAX(m.createdAt) FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id) WHERE d.lastMessageAt IS NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id); UPDATE dialogs d SET d.lastMessageText = (SELECT m.text FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC LIMIT 1) WHERE d.lastMessageText IS NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute UPDATE dialogs d SET d.lastMessageAt = (SELECT MAX(m.createdAt) FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id) WHERE d.lastMessageAt IS NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id); UPDATE dialogs d SET d.lastMessageText = (SELECT m.text FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC LIMIT 1) WHERE d.lastMessageText IS NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages m WHERE m.dialogId = d.id);
